# targets.utils

Some simple utility functions for interactively writing and running
targets pipelines.

## Installation

You can install the development version of targets.utils from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("geryan/targets.utils")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`insert_tar_target()`](https://geryan.github.io/targets.utils/reference/insert_tar_target.md)
  : Insert a tar_target() skeleton
- [`it()`](https://geryan.github.io/targets.utils/reference/it.md) :
  Insert a tar_target() skeleton
- [`tar_downstream()`](https://geryan.github.io/targets.utils/reference/tar_downstream.md)
  : NOT WORKING PROPERLY YET
- [`tl()`](https://geryan.github.io/targets.utils/reference/tl.md) :
  Targets load globals and everything
- [`tml()`](https://geryan.github.io/targets.utils/reference/tml.md) :
  Target make and load
